landing.hero_subtitle: Xeni AI completely automates your customer conversations, product inventory, and sales intelligence so you can focus on growth.

seo_audit.name: SEO Intelligence Agent
seo_audit.description: Run comprehensive site audits and uncover critical performance gaps. Receive actionable, AI-driven optimization strategies to increase visibility and dominate search engine rankings.
features: Automated technical SEO audits and error reporting.
seo_audit.locked_message: Upgrade your plan to access the SEO Audit Agent

content_writing.name: Content Strategy & Creation Agent
content_writing.description: Publish high-converting, SEO-optimized content at scale. Generate compelling blog posts, technical articles, and persuasive marketing copy engineered to rank and drive conversions.
content_writing.locked_message: Upgrade to Basic to access Content Writer

lead_generation.name: Outbound Lead Generation Agent
lead_generation.description: Accelerate your sales pipeline with intelligent prospecting. Automatically discover high-value targets, verify contact information, and enrich lead data for targeted outbound outreach.
features: Waterfall email and phone number enrichment.
Automated CRM syncing and data cleaning.
lead_generation.locked_message: Upgrade to Pro to access Lead Generation

social_media.name: Social Media Automation Agent
social_media.description: Scale your brand presence across all major platforms. Generate highly engaging, algorithm-optimized posts complete with tailored hashtags and data-backed scheduling strategies.
features: Algorithm-tailored formatting for LinkedIn, X, and Instagram.
Trending topic and viral hook generation.
Optimal post timing based on audience analytics.
Automated reply engagement for standard comments.
social_media.locked_message: Upgrade to Pro to access Social Media Agent

email_marketing.name: Email Conversion Agent
email_marketing.description: Architect high-performing email sequences that drive revenue. Optimize open rates with dynamic subject lines and deploy sophisticated drip campaigns that nurture prospects.
features: Inbox deliverability monitoring and spam-trap avoidance.
email_marketing.locked_message: Upgrade to Pro to access Email Marketing

analytics.name: Business Intelligence & Analytics Agent
analytics.description: Transform complex raw datasets into clear, strategic advantages. Leverage predictive forecasting, advanced trend analysis, and dynamic visualizations to drive data-backed decisions.
analytics.locked_message: Upgrade to Enterprise to access Analytics

auth.verify_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your XENI account
auth.register_subtitle: Get started with XENI for free
